name: Talked to adjuster already about AI referral issue—did I mess up?
description: Lawyer up immediately; damage control in any state.

mainEntity.name: Talked to adjuster already about AI referral issue—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lawyer up immediately; damage control in any state.
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly; statements can hurt. No admissions bind you. Key factors: (1) Recorded? (2) Clam up now; (3) Lawyer review. Common mistake, recoverable.
